description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a classic rectangular form, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The main building features a gable roof with dark shingles, white exterior walls, and a prominent front porch supported by columns. A detached single-car garage with a matching gable roof sits to the left of the house, connected by a paved driveway and walkway. The rear of the house includes a covered porch and a rectangular pool, providing outdoor living space. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with double-hung sashes and decorative shutters on the front facade. The property is bordered by grass and trees, giving it a suburban neighborhood feel.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and surrounding lawn with trees. Symmetrical windows and a rear pool add to its suburban charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with columns, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the gable roof, rear porch, and pool area, with trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the covered rear porch, pool, and the connection between the house and garage.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, rear lawn, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the house's side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and decorative trim.
